nasb.text: He returns what he has attained And cannot swallow it; As to the riches of his trading, He cannot even enjoy them.

esv.text: He will give back the fruit of his toil and will not swallow it down; from the profit of his trading he will get no enjoyment.

cnv.text: 他勞苦所得的必歸別人，自己卻不得吃用； 他交易得來的財利，自己卻不得享用。

ccb.text: 他留不住劳碌的成果， 无法享用所赚的财富。
